note: The EXACT aicanvas-premium commit this public tree builds against. Production (the Vercel/PAT build) checks out THIS sha, never floating main, so every deploy is reproducible and an unrelated public push can't drag in a different premium version. Bump it only via `npm run publish-premium` (which pushes premium, writes the new sha here, and pushes public to deploy). The value is just a commit id, never premium source, so it is safe in the public repo.
